---
title: "The Effecs of Primary Care Clinic Closures: How Older People's Geographical Distance to Care Affects Their Health and Service Use?"
author: xx
format: gmf
editor: visual
---

# The effecs of primary care clinic closures: How older people's geographical distance to care affects their health and service use?

xxx

## Setup

```{r}
#| label: preliminaries
#| echo: true
#| output: false

# Load 'here' package for relative file paths
  library(here)

# Run setup script
  source(here::here("scripts", "setup.R"), echo = FALSE)
```

## Identifying closed stations

How closed clinics are identified:

```{r}
1 + 1
```

TBA

## Maps

Drawing map of closed cliinics with population density here:

```{r}
2 * 2
```

Draw map of the new clinics here:

```{r}

```

Draw map of all clinics:

```{r}

```

## Municipality level descriptive statistics

Descriptive statistics using Sotkanet data here.

```{r}

```
